// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable

using Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection;

namespace MainApp;

/// <summary>
/// Extension methods for registering services from MainApp.
/// </summary>
public static class MainAppServiceCollectionExtensions
{
    /// <summary>
    /// Registers all services tagged with 'Mediator'.
    /// </summary>
    public static IServiceCollection AddMainApp_Mediator(this IServiceCollection services)
    {
        services.AddSingleton<global::MainApp.TestQueryHandler, global::MainApp.TestQueryHandler>();
        services.AddSingleton<global::SharedModule.IRequestHandler<global::MainApp.TestQuery, string>, global::MainApp.TestQueryHandler>();

        return services;
    }
}
